defaultContent._rule: No default content defined; do not invent labels, icons, or copy. Use only what is in the spec or leave slots empty.

events.name: click
events.description: Step indicator click when stepper is interactive

state.name: status
state.description: completed | current | upcoming; passed from parent Stepper
